diagrams.title: Row Space Visualization in R³
diagrams.description: Shows how row vectors span a subspace in n-dimensional space
elements: Row vectors as arrows in R³
Their linear combinations fill a plane (2D subspace)
diagrams.purpose: Understand row space as geometric subspace

diagrams.title: Column Space in R³
diagrams.description: Shows column vectors generating a subspace in output space
elements: Their span creates subspace passing through origin
diagrams.purpose: Visualize column space as output space subspace

diagrams.title: Rank-Nullity Decomposition
diagrams.description: Shows how n-dimensional space splits into row space and null space
